product.name: SprintFlow
product.category: Sprint planning tool for engineering teams
product.overview: SprintFlow helps engineering leaders plan predictable sprints with capacity-aware scheduling, backlog prioritization, and data-driven forecasting. It integrates with Jira, GitHub, and Linear to keep plans and execution in sync.
key_features: Capacity modeling that accounts for PTO, holidays, and interrupts
Scenario planning (what-if) for backlog items and scope trade-offs
Definition of Ready and acceptance criteria checklists
Two-way sync with Jira and GitHub issues
Team availability with per-person load balancing

pains: Surprise PTO and interrupts break plans
Unclear Definition of Ready leads to thrash
Under/over-committing due to poor capacity signals

goals: Coach the team on agile best practices
pains: Planning meetings run long and unfocused
Roadmap dates slip without early warnings
Hard to see trade-offs during planning

differentiators: Capacity modeling with PTO and interrupts built-in
Scenario planning with real-time impact on sprint goal probability
Guardrails for Definition of Ready to reduce thrash
positioning.why_choose_us: SprintFlow combines practical capacity math with clear planning workflows so teams commit confidently and hit their goals more often.

compliance.claims_policy: Use concrete numbers with sources or label as example
compliance.links_policy: Link to credible sources such as Scrum Guide, Agile Alliance, and peer-reviewed industry reports

ctas.secondary: Download the sprint planning agenda template
